message:
chore(beads): close ft-v5lz3.1.2 — capture/storage sweep memory GC verified clean

in recorder_storage.rs lines 3697-3801, all inside #[cfg(test)] mod
tests block starting at line 1234. 62 bare Ok(()) lines all >2 lines
into function body (gap analysis via awk found no stub-suspect cases).
Removed stale memory file and MEMORY.md index entry per ft-v5lz3.1.2
GC path.
